---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
data <- read.csv("data/cel_volden_wiseman.csv")
```

```{r}
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
data <- data %>% mutate(nazwisko = str_split_i(thomas_name, ',', 1))
```

```{r}
sum(str_starts(data$nazwisko[data$congress], "M"))
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(female == 1, congress == 110) %>% count()
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(congress == 110) %>% add_count(st_name) %>% filter(n >= 5) %>% group_by(st_name) %>% summarise(les_mean = mean(les)) %>% arrange(desc(les_mean))
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(congress == 110) %>% group_by(st_name) %>% filter(n() >= 5) %>% summarise(les_mean = mean(les)) %>% arrange(desc(les_mean))
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(congress == 110) %>% distinct(st_name) %>% count()
```

```{r}
n_distinct(data$st_name[data$congress == 110])
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(congress == 110) %>% group_by(st_name) %>% mutate(state_mean = mean(les)) %>% filter(les > state_mean) %>% nrow()
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(congress == 110) %>% slice_max(les) %>% select(thomas_name, les)
```

```{r}
data %>% mutate(imie = str_split_i(thomas_name, ",",2)) %>% select(thomas_name, nazwisko, imie)
```

```{r}
aggregate(les ~ female, data, subset = (congress ==110), mean)
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(congress == 110)  %>% group_by(female) %>% summarise(les_mean = mean(les))
```
